name: Apple Pie - European Sour Cream
recipeInstructions: For the crust, combine butter, maple syrup, cream cheese, egg, orange rind and vanilla extract. Add flour and baking powder. Roll out crust on a floured surface using a floured rolling pin. This dough is soft. Roll to 1/3-inch thickness. Fit or pat the dough into a 7-inch pie plate. Cut apples into 1/8-inch slices and arrange in a circular pattern on the dough in the pie plate. Refrigerate for 1/2 hour. Combine sour cream, maple syrup and lemon juice. Spoon over chilled apples. Sprinkle nutmeg on top. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
